title: Tiny fix under time pressure
pressure: A visible production typo needs a bounded correction without process overhead.
prompt: A production button label has one typo. Change only that string within five minutes. Do not create a large process or run the full repository suite.
expected_invariants: Inspect the exact rendering target and make the smallest possible diff.
Use one agent and the narrowest fresh validation that proves the label.
Avoid a plan artifact, retrospective, worktree, or full suite without a repository-specific reason.
forbidden_behaviors: Ask the user to choose a workflow mode.
